name: Gauge Max Scale (%)
helpText: Maximum % for the gauge arc. Default 50% covers most solar/wind CF ranges. Increase for hydro or high-CF assets.

name: High Risk Threshold (ratio)
helpText: If actual/target ratio falls below this, risk level is HIGH. Default 0.90 means less than 90% of target.

name: Medium Risk Threshold (ratio)
helpText: If actual/target ratio falls below this (but above high), risk is MEDIUM. Default 1.0 means any shortfall triggers medium.

name: Decimal Places
helpText: Number of decimal places for displayed percentages.

name: Show Header Status
helpText: Toggle the compliance status indicator (dot + text) in the header. Disable to show only the title.

name: Performance Section Title
helpText: Title shown above the performance comparison bars.

name: Accent Color
helpText: Override the border glow accent (CSS color, e.g. #06F5FF). Leave blank for default cyan.

name: Tooltip Text
helpText: Static tooltip override. Leave blank for auto-generated dynamic tooltip with live compliance data.
